label: Per-Venue Balances
description: Free, locked, total, margin, and utilisation balances broken down per connected venue.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: emptyMessage='No balance data available' forwarded to TableWidget.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: orgVenues memo filters balances by org-owned venues.

1.4.note: No clientIds cascade in accounts-data-context.tsx — human to decide if client-level filtering is in scope.

1.5.note: Account balances have no strategy dimension.

1.7.note: ACCOUNTS fixture used for org-venue mapping in context (should move to lib/constants/accounts.ts). MOCK_SAFTS is demo data — deferred.

l1.notes: Widget data flow clean. Two context-level findings (clientIds filter, ACCOUNTS fixture location) flagged but not blocking.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied per spec §L2 2026-04-17 update. Commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea cover all 17 domains.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓, paper ✓ (venue label suffix '(Paper)'), batch ✓ ('(T+1)' suffix). Context applies mode via isPaper/isBatch.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() and applies venue label modification.

3.5.note: Paper mode: venue names show '(Paper)' suffix; table data unchanged. Acceptable for display-only widget.

3.6.note: Table widget is read-only. No WebSocket/polling intervals in widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (no order entry). 3.4 human pending.

4.1.note: onRefresh handler wired to refetch (not a dead button).

4.6.note: No entitlement checks on render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 human walkthrough pending.

5.1.note: Target strategies: none — account-level balance table serves all strategies indirectly.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not written this pass.

7.1.note: No hex/rgb/hsl. var(--status-critical/warning/live) are CSS vars, not hardcoded hex.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: rows derived via useMemo with stable [balances] dep. No inline object literals in effect deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. Fixed: --status-error → --status-critical (undefined token replaced). 7.5 deferred.

8.1.note: Fixed: replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on line 75 (utilization badge) after text-micro token landed in globals.css.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, TableWidget (shared). Columns use standard HTML spans — acceptable for table cell renderers.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no interactive
. Human keyboard walkthrough pending.

8.5.note: Human resize test at minW=6/minH=3 pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Balance table is a full-featured sortable table with margin utilization columns. KPI strip serves a different layout need. Keep separate.

relationships.notes: Reads from same AccountsDataProvider as all accounts widgets.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data (via accounts-data-context; balance records via useBalances hook)
dataContract.notes: useBalances() hook fetches per-venue balance records. Margin derived in widget from balance fields.

gaps: DeFi wallet balances not represented — on-chain balances would require separate data source
No clientIds filtering wired in context (L1.4 partial)
coverage.notes: Venue list is CeFi-only in mock data. Widget supports any venue that returns BalanceRecord shape.

knownIssues.detail: globalScope.clientIds is not read or applied as a filter. Human to decide if client-level filtering is in scope for the accounts domain.

knownIssues.summary: ACCOUNTS fixture used as org-venue reference data in context
knownIssues.detail: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data to derive orgVenues. Should live in lib/constants/accounts.ts.

knownIssues.summary: MOCK_SAFTS demo data surfaced via saftRecords in context
knownIssues.detail: Acceptable while a real SAFT API does not exist, but flagged for future cleanup.

findings.description: accounts-balance-table-widget.tsx:77 — var(--status-error) used but token not defined in globals.css (only --status-critical exists)
findings.fix: Replaced var(--status-error) with var(--status-critical) on line 77

findings.description: accounts-balance-table-widget.tsx — ~9 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helpers
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: accounts-balance-table-widget.tsx:75 — text-[10px] used for utilization badge label, no text-2xs token exists
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on accounts-balance-table-widget.tsx:75 (utilization badge).
